_meta.source: unite-db.com/pokemon.json (Mathcord-sourced; the data its site uses)
_meta.validated: Pikachu Thunder Shock 0.75*SpAtk + 21*(Lv-1) + 390 matches reference engine exactly
_meta.formula: component damage = base + slider*(level-1) + ratio*stat[dmg_type], then *600/(600+def)
_meta.coverage: passive + basic + 2 base moves + Unite move per mon (the pre-evo kit); not Lv5/7 upgrades
